div.head: 380. Memorandum of ConversationSource: Kennedy Library, National Security Files, Countries Series, Philippines, General, 1/63–6/63. Confidential. Drafted by Bell. The ending time of the meeting, which was held at the White House, is from the President’s Appointment Book. (Ibid.) The source text is labeled “Part I of IV”; for Parts II–IV, see Documents 381–383.

list.head: PARTICIPANTS
list.item: The Honorable Emmanuel Pelaez, Philippine Vice President and Secretary for Foreign Affairs
The Honorable Amelito Mutuc, Philippine Ambassador
The Honorable Salvador P. Lopez, Philippine Under Secretary for Foreign Affairs
Mr. Bell, Director, Office of Southwest Pacific Affairs

div.p: In answer to a question by Vice President Pelaez, President Kennedy said that he hoped to visit the Philippines and that he would look at the situation this summer to see whether it would be possible to make a visit to a number of places in the Far East.
